title: A remo
overview: Abraham Levy is a Mexican adventurer who left behind his monotonous, normal life to explore nature and undertake impossible challenges. Pursuing his childhood dream, he decides to cross the Atlantic Ocean on his own, with only the help of his arms aboard a rowboat called Cascarita.

trailers.title: Abraham Levy, el primer hombre que atraviesa el atlántico a remo.
